SOUL_FYSH.title: Soul Fysh Pip
SOUL_FYSH.description: Gain Soul Fysh Pip as your companion.

ALWAYSSOULFYSHPIP-SOUL_FYSH_PIP_RELIC.title: Soul Fysh Pip
ALWAYSSOULFYSHPIP-SOUL_FYSH_PIP_RELIC.description: At the start of each combat, summon Soul Fysh Pip.
ALWAYSSOULFYSHPIP-SOUL_FYSH_PIP_RELIC.flavor: A tiny echo of the deep answers Neow's call.

ALWAYSSOULFYSHPIP-WRIGGLER_RELIC.title: Wriggler
ALWAYSSOULFYSHPIP-WRIGGLER_RELIC.description: At the start of each combat, summon Wriggler.
ALWAYSSOULFYSHPIP-WRIGGLER_RELIC.flavor: Small, determined, and already chewing on destiny.
